title: How To Design a Complete Brand Identity With AI (Best AI Logo Maker)
summary: Design.com is an AI-powered platform for creating complete brand identities including logos, brand kits, business cards, and social media templates. The tool uses AI logo generation, natural language editing, and auto-applies brand kits across 500,000+ templates. It also includes features like background removal, presentation generation, and animated logos for social media.
writeup: This video walks through Design.com, an AI-powered platform for building a complete brand identity, covering logos, brand kits, business cards, and social media templates. It demonstrates AI logo generation, natural language editing, and brand kit automation that auto-applies a brand across more than 500,000 templates. Additional features shown include background removal, presentation generation, and animated logos for social media. The takeaway is a single tool that handles brand asset creation end to end rather than requiring separate design steps.
